01 — About Me

WHO AM I

Hey there! I'm Ezhil Rao G, a curious and driven student web developer from Thanjavur, Tamil Nadu. I recently completed my Class 12 and I'm on a mission to craft meaningful digital experiences.

I'm fascinated by two things above all else — the infinite possibilities of technology and the infinite expanse of space. When I'm not coding, I'm stargazing or reading about the latest in space exploration.
